items.userIntent: Nigerian salary users want practical help using the Swahili PAYE calculator without relying on stale rate claims.
validationNeeded: No tax-rate claims unless sourced from the paired tool/page
Link to /sw/nigeria/kikokotoo-kodi-mshahara/
Check links and hreflang after creation

items.userIntent: Kenyan salary users need a Kiswahili bridge from calculator use to official verification.
validationNeeded: Avoid tax-rate restatement unless already supported by the calculator
Link to /sw/kenya/kikokotoo-kodi-mshahara/
Check links and hreflang after creation

items.userIntent: Business users want to understand when to use the pan-African VAT calculator and when to verify official rates.
validationNeeded: Do not publish country VAT tables in the stub
Link to /sw/zana/kikokotoo-vat/
Check links and hreflang after creation

items.userIntent: Mobile-money users need a practical Swahili explainer for comparing fees without claiming live provider prices.
validationNeeded: Avoid current fee tables unless a live source is wired
Link to /sw/fintech/ and /sw/zana/ada-pesa-simu/ when available
Check links and hreflang after creation

items.userIntent: Nigerian employees want a Swahili explanation of net salary, deductions, and calculator verification.
validationNeeded: Avoid fixed salary examples that imply current official rates
Link to /sw/mshahara-na-kodi/ and /sw/nigeria/kikokotoo-kodi-mshahara/
Check links and hreflang after creation

items.userIntent: Users want a live exchange rate, which should not be converted into a static Swahili stub without a live-data source.
validationNeeded: Keep English-only bridge honest
Prefer /sw/sarafu/ until live Swahili FX content exists

items.userIntent: Farmers and agri-planners need a low-risk guide to using crop-yield estimates without promising harvest outcomes.
validationNeeded: Avoid weather, price, or yield guarantees
Link to /sw/kilimo/ and any existing Swahili crop-yield tool
Check links and hreflang after creation

notes: Do not invent Swahili routes for live-rate or tax-table content.
Each new stub should disclose when the source article remains English-only.
Each new stub should favor a Swahili tool or hub as the primary next action.
